notes: release decision: conditional for the requested change because current Vercel production serves f8588b97/v8.11.145, not the latest graceful-exit implementation commit a512fb6a4.
Q1, Q3, and Q5 passed with explicit monitoring/tool-grounded metadata; Q2 and Q4 returned usable specific answers but showed generic response metadata, so they are recorded as warnings.
Known pre-auth /api/system 401 console resource error was observed once and matches existing WONT-FIX item landing-console-api-system-unauthorized.
mode audit: standard five-question set used mixed /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and /api/ai/jobs/[id]/stream paths; no AI HTTP failures observed.
Vercel billed usage remained 0.0000 USD after the live QA run.
